languages.text: "Сержант Янур Батошски, 3-ий взвод обеспечения 32-го меровского полка. Рады приветствовать на Заркове, Ваш... Ваша Светлость". {n}Последние слова Янур произносит с легкой запинкой, на ходу вспоминая их звучание.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Сержант Янур Батошски, 3-ий взвод обеспечения 32-го меровского полка. Рады приветствовать на Заркове, Ваш... Ваша Светлость". {n}Последние слова Янур произносит с легкой запинкой, на ходу вспоминая их звучание.{/n}
traits.speaker: JanurZarkovSergeant

languages.text: "Sergeant Janur Batoshski, 3rd Supply Platoon, 32nd Merov Regiment. We are pleased to welcome you to Zarkov, Your... Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}Janur stumbles slightly over these words, as if recalling their sound as he goes.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Сержант Янур Батошски, 3-ий взвод обеспечения 32-го меровского полка. Рады приветствовать на Заркове, Ваш... Ваша Светлость". {n}Последние слова Янур произносит с легкой запинкой, на ходу вспоминая их звучание.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Sergeant Janur Batoshski, 3rd Support Platoon, 32nd Merov Regiment. We are pleased to welcome you to Zarkov, Your... Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}Janur stumbles slightly over the final words, as if recalling their sound on the go.{/n}

"Sergeant Janur Batoshski, 3rd Support Platoon, 32nd Merov Regiment. We are pleased to welcome you to Zarkov, Your... Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}Janur stumbles slightly over these words, as if recalling their sound as he goes.{/n}
"You don't say... It's dangerous here — we'll take you to our commander, Colonel Batoshski."

"Sergeant Janur Batoshski, 3rd Support Platoon, 32nd Merov Regiment. We are pleased to welcome you to Zarkov, Your... Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}Janur stumbles slightly over the final words, as if recalling their sound on the go.{/n}

"Sergeant Janur Batoshski, 3rd Support Platoon, 32nd Merov Regiment. We are pleased to welcome you to Zarkov, Your... Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}Janur stumbles slightly over these words, as if recalling their sound as he goes.{/n}

"Sergeant Janur Batoshski, 3rd Supply Platoon, 32nd Merov Regiment. We are pleased to welcome you to Zarkov, Your... Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}Janur stumbles slightly over these words, as if recalling their sound as he goes.{/n}

languages.text: 「まさか…ここは危険です。あなたを司令官、バトシスキー大佐に連れて行きます」
languages.original_text: "You don't say... It's dangerous here — we'll take you to our commander, Colonel Batoshski."

languages.text: "Çavuş Janur Batoshski, 3. İkmal Müfrezesi, 32. Merov Alayı. Sizi Zarkov'da ağırlamaktan memnuniyet duyuyoruz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri." {n}Janur, bu kelimeleri söylerken sanki kulağa nasıl geldiklerini hatırlamaya çalışır gibi hafifçe tekliyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Sergeant Janur Batoshski, 3rd Supply Platoon, 32nd Merov Regiment. We are pleased to welcome you to Zarkov, Your... Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}Janur stumbles slightly over these words, as if recalling their sound as he goes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Çavuş Janur Batoshski, 3. İkmal Müfrezesi, 32. Merov Alayı. Sizi Zarkov'da ağırlamaktan memnuniyet duyuyoruz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri." {n}Janur, bu kelimeleri söylerken sanki kulağa nasıl geldiklerini hatırlamaya çalışır gibi hafifçe tekliyor.{/n}

"Çavuş Janur Batoshski, 3. Destek Müfrezesi, 32. Merov Alayı. Sizi Zarkov'da ağırlamaktan memnuniyet duyuyoruz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri." {n}Janur, bu kelimeleri söylerken sanki kulağa nasıl geldiklerini hatırlamaya çalışır gibi hafifçe tekliyor.{/n}

languages.text: “雅努尔·巴托什斯基军士，隶属梅罗夫第32团第三后勤排。欢迎您来到扎尔科夫，我们倍感荣幸，舰……舰长大人。”{n}雅努尔说这话时有些磕磕绊绊，像是一边说一边在回忆这些词该怎么念。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Sergeant Janur Batoshski, 3rd Supply Platoon, 32nd Merov Regiment. We are pleased to welcome you to Zarkov, Your... Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}Janur stumbles slightly over these words, as if recalling their sound as he goes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “雅努尔·巴托什斯基军士，隶属梅罗夫第32团第三后勤排。欢迎您来到扎尔科夫，我们倍感荣幸，舰……舰长大人。”{n}雅努尔说这话时有些磕磕绊绊，像是一边说一边在回忆这些词该怎么念。{/n}

languages.text: "Sergeant Janur Batoshski, 3. Versorgungszug, 32. Merov-Regiment. Wir freuen uns, Euch auf Zarkov begrüßen zu dürfen, Eure ... Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}." {n}Janur stolpert leicht über diese Worte, als müsste er sich ihren Klang beim Sprechen in Erinnerung rufen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Sergeant Janur Batoshski, 3rd Supply Platoon, 32nd Merov Regiment. We are pleased to welcome you to Zarkov, Your... Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}Janur stumbles slightly over these words, as if recalling their sound as he goes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Sergeant Janur Batoshski, 3. Versorgungszug, 32. Merov-Regiment. Wir freuen uns, Euch auf Zarkov begrüßen zu dürfen, Eure ... Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}." {n}Janur stolpert leicht über diese Worte, als müsste er sich ihren Klang beim Sprechen in Erinnerung rufen.{/n}

"Sergeant Janur Batoshski, 3. Versorgungszug, 32. Merov-Regiment. Wir freuen uns, Euch auf Zarkov begrüßen zu dürfen, Eure ... Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}." {n}Janur stolpert leicht über diese Worte, als müsste er sich ihren Klang beim Sprechen in Erinnerung rufen.{/n}

languages.text: « Sergent Janur Batoshski, 3e peloton d'approvisionnement, 32e Régiment de Merov. Nous sommes ravis de vous accueillir sur Zarkov, Votre... Votre Seigneurie. » {n}Janur bute légèrement sur ces mots, comme s'ils lui revenaient en mémoire au fil de l'eau.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Sergeant Janur Batoshski, 3rd Supply Platoon, 32nd Merov Regiment. We are pleased to welcome you to Zarkov, Your... Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}Janur stumbles slightly over these words, as if recalling their sound as he goes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Sergent Janur Batoshski, 3e peloton d'approvisionnement, 32e Régiment de Merov. Nous sommes ravis de vous accueillir sur Zarkov, Votre... Votre Seigneurie. » {n}Janur bute légèrement sur ces mots, comme s'ils lui revenaient en mémoire au fil de l'eau.{/n}

« Sergent Janur Batoshski, 3e peloton du génie, 32e régiment de Merov. Nous sommes ravis de vous accueillir sur Zarkov, Votre... Votre Seigneurie. » {n}Janur bute légèrement sur ces mots, comme s'ils lui revenaient en mémoire au fil de l'eau.{/n}

languages.text: «Sargento Janur Batoshski, 3.er pelotón de suministros, 32.º regimiento de Merov. Nos complace darle la bienvenida a Zarkov, mi... mi{mf|lord|lady}». {n}Janur tartamudea ligeramente al decir estas palabras, como si estuviera recordando su pronunciación sobre la marcha.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Sergeant Janur Batoshski, 3rd Supply Platoon, 32nd Merov Regiment. We are pleased to welcome you to Zarkov, Your... Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}Janur stumbles slightly over these words, as if recalling their sound as he goes.{/n}

«Sargento Janur Batoshski, 3.er pelotón de apoyo, 32.º regimiento de Merov. Nos complace darle la bienvenida a Zarkov, mi... mi{mf|lord|lady}». {n}Janur tartamudea ligeramente al decir estas palabras, como si estuviera recordando su pronunciación sobre la marcha.{/n}
